rationale: Locale formatting (comma decimal vs period decimal) is consistent with the captured Figma frame for a EU banking flow; reviewer accepted.

goldVerdicts.rationale: Banking-domain SME first-pass review: Locale formatting (comma decimal vs period decimal) is consistent with the captured Figma frame for a EU banking flow; reviewer accepted.
